_comment: Opt-in function-level call graph subsystems. Each entry produces docs/architecture/generated/calls/<name>.md with a Mermaid graph of function calls within the listed files. Add a new entry to track a new subsystem at function granularity.

subsystems.name: notifications
subsystems.title: Notification Dispatch
subsystems.description: All paths through which Sanctuary delivers notifications (Telegram, push, AI insights). The Telegram dual-path bug lived here — this graph makes new entry points to either path visible at PR-review time.
